descriptionShort: Box score of Boston University versus North Dakota college hockey game with final score and penalty details.
descriptionLong: Box score from a college hockey game between Boston University and North Dakota, published March 18, 1990. Boston University won 7-2, with Tony Amonte scoring twice and multiple contributors. The game featured numerous penalties including roughing, highsticking, and slashing infractions. Notable players included Amonte, Tomlinson, and North Dakota's Ward.
